message:
🐛 Fix Copilot assignment to use copilot-swe-agent[bot] with agent_assignment (#263)

The simple addAssignees(['Copilot']) call doesn't trigger the Copilot
coding agent. Use the correct REST API format with copilot-swe-agent[bot]
and the agent_assignment payload specifying target_repo and base_branch.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
